name: Julio's Hot Carrots (Appetizers)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe makes about 1 gallon of hot carrots.
Use fresh carrots which have been peeled and cut into diagonal slices.
One 12-ounce jar of whole jalapenos with juice.
Cook the carrots in boiling water until they reach the desired tenderness. They should remain crisp.
Drain the cooked carrots.
Combine the carrots, jalapenos, onions, oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper in a large glass jar or bowl.
Chill for at least 3 hours.
